name: Surya Arghya Heirloom Kanjeevaram Saree
description: Handwoven with nostalgic 80s vintage temple borders, this radiant saffron silk saree embodies the divine spirit of Chhath Puja. Pure zari brocade woven with intricate sun motifs ensures an unforgettable grace at the morning ghat rituals.

name: Retro Crimson Zari Banarasi Silk Saree
description: Exuding timeless charm, this vintage red Banarasi silk features classic antique gold kadwa weave patterns inspired by royal eras. Perfect for evening Arghya offerings, it comes with an unstitched vintage-style brocade blouse piece.

name: Vintage Marigold Tissue Chanderi Suit Set
description: Channel 70s Bollywood elegance with this luminous marigold tissue chanderi kurta set detailed with retro gota patti handwork. Paired with a vintage scalloped dupatta, it offers breezy comfort for long festive rituals.

name: Nostalgic Surya Motif Antique Brass Jhumkas
description: Crafted to evoke retro temple jewelry design, these handcrafted antique brass jhumkas feature delicate sunburst engravings. They add an authentic heirloom touch to your traditional Chhath Puja drape.

name: Heritage Magenta Brocade Anarkali Dress
description: Designed with classic retro puff sleeves and a sweeping floor-length silhouette, this magenta brocade Anarkali brings 90s vintage glam to Chhath celebrations. Rich gold zari highlights make it a standout choice for festival gatherings.

name: Vintage Sunkissed Orange Organza Saree
description: A dreamy retro sheer organza saree painted with nostalgic botanical floral motifs and trimmed with antique gold lace. Lightweight and ethereal, it is ideal for standing in prayer at the holy riverbank.

name: Antique Emerald Green Tussar Silk Dupatta
description: Richly textured tussar silk dupatta featuring retro kantha stitch embroidery and traditional border detail. Wrap yourself in warmth and vintage style during early morning Chhath Arghya prayers.

name: Royal Peacock Blue Heritage Jamdani Saree
description: Inspired by mid-century traditional drapes, this handspun Jamdani saree showcases intricate retro geometric motifs in burnished gold threads. A refined pick for women who appreciate quiet luxury and vintage craftsmanship.

name: Sunset Amber Raw Silk Sharara Set
description: Step out in retro grandeur with this amber-hued raw silk sharara set embellished with antique dori and dabka work. The short vintage-cut tunic and flared sharara ensure seamless elegance throughout Chhath festivities.

name: Vintage Vermillion Bandhani Silk Saree
description: Traditional tie-dye artwork meets classic 60s vintage borders on this vibrant vermillion red bandhani silk saree. An evergreen heirloom piece symbolizing prosperity and sacred devotion for Chhath Puja.

name: Heirloom Temple Sun-God Gold Potli Bag
description: Adorned with retro coin tassels and embossed Surya iconography, this vintage velvet potli bag completes your traditional attire. It thoughtfully stores all your puja essentials with timeless panache.

name: Retro Terracotta Chanderi Silk Kurta Set
description: Embodying warm autumn energy, this terracotta chanderi kurta set features classic 70s keyhole neckline and delicate aari embroidery. Paired with straight pants and a sheer dupatta, it is effortless for daytime puja preparations.

name: Antique Golden Ochre Tassar Silk Saree
description: Draped in warmth, this raw-textured golden ochre tassar silk saree features vintage zari weaves along the pallu. Designed for morning Arghya offerings, it balances regal dignity with comfortable elegance.

name: Retro Plum Velvet Embroidered Shawl
description: Wrap up against chilly morning river breezes with this plush plum velvet shawl featuring intricate antique gold tilla embroidery. A quintessential vintage accessory for Chhath Puja rituals at dawn.

name: Classic Mustard Yellow Cotton Silk Angrakha
description: Designed with an authentic retro side-tie silhouette, this mustard yellow cotton silk Angrakha suit captures royal nostalgia. Intricate mirror work along the neckline adds extra sparkle to festive riverbank rituals.

name: Vintage Copper Zari Maheshwari Saree
description: Handwoven Maheshwari silk-cotton saree detailed with muted copper zari check patterns reminiscent of 80s heritage weaving. Extremely lightweight and gracefully structured for prolonged festival hours.

name: Retro Ruby Red Silk Brocade Blouse
description: Tailored with sweet 70s retro puff sleeves and sweetheart neckline, this ruby red brocade blouse complements any heritage drape. Woven with subtle metallic floral motifs to elevate your Chhath Puja outfit.

name: Golden Hour Banarasi Tissue Dupatta
description: Radiant tissue dupatta woven with retro floral jaal work in warm sunset tones, capturing the divine light of Arghya. Pair it with simple solid kurtas to instantly transform your festive ensemble.

name: Antique Filigree Silver Sun Pendant Necklace
description: A nod to vintage solar motifs, this oxidized silver filigree necklace features an engraved Sun God emblem. Designed as a symbolic piece of jewelry to honor Surya Devta during Chhath Puja rituals.

name: Vintage Coral Orange Patola Silk Saree
description: Showcasing authentic vintage double ikat geometric art, this coral orange Patola silk saree is an iconic royal heirloom. Rich contrast borders make it an unforgettable attire choice for evening festive prayers.

name: Tweed Blazer & Banarasi Silk Saree Set
description: Merge collegiate sophistication with Pandal hopping elegance in this unique ensemble featuring a sharp tweed blazer styled over a rich crimson Banarasi silk saree. The structured tailoring provides cozy warmth during late-night Durga Puja celebrations while maintaining a high-fashion academic silhouette.

name: Burgundy Velvet Trench Anarkali Suit
description: Crafted from heavy plush velvet, this double-breasted trench-inspired Anarkali brings a moody scholarly aesthetic to festive evenings. Intricate antique zari embroidery along the lapels elevates the deep wine tone for Ashtami night prayers.

name: Emerald Houndstooth Khadi Silk Kurta Jacket
description: This sharp tailored set pairs a dark emerald khadi silk straight kurta with a structured houndstooth woolen jacket. Ideal for crisp autumn Pandal visits, it effortlessly blends scholar chic with traditional festive flair.

name: Plaid Wool-Blend Overlay Chanderi Saree
description: Wrap yourself in intellect and heritage with this woven Chanderi saree paired with a coordinating plaid wool-blend overlay coat. Designed for cool autumn winds during Nabami, this drape turns traditional elegance into a literary statement.

name: Oatmeal Cashmere Turtleneck Dhoti Set
description: A contemporary fusion ensemble featuring a cozy fine-knit turtleneck top styled with draped raw silk dhoti pants. Perfect for the stylish Gen-Z looking for warmth and effortless mobility during daytime Puja rituals.

name: Deep Ochre Corduroy Nehru Jacket Silk Kurta
description: Elevate your Puja wardrobe with a fine-ribbed corduroy Nehru jacket layered over a lustrous raw silk kurta set. Rich autumn tones and crisp tailoring give this outfit an undeniable vintage academic appeal.

name: Forest Green Pleated Jacquard Maxi Skirt Set
description: Inspired by vintage library aesthetics, this rich dark green jacquard maxi skirt is paired with a fitted high-neck velvet bodice. The structured golden weave offers timeless regal glamour for Dashami celebrations.

name: Crimson Woolen Brocade Tailored Trench Coat
description: A showstopping outerwear piece combining warm wool brocade with classic trench coat lapels and golden zari motifs. Layer it over a simple silk drape for protection against chilly evening breeze while keeping the festive mood intact.

name: Espresso Organza Saree with Knit Cardigan
description: A sheer coffee-brown organza saree featuring antique gold border embroidery paired with a cropped rib-knit winter cardigan. This subtle yet moody look is designed for quiet morning library sessions followed by Saptami pandal tours.

name: Midnight Navy Pashmina Embroidered Blazer
description: Tailored from soft woven pashmina wool, this sharp double-breasted blazer is adorned with intricate Kashmiri needlework across the lapels. It seamlessly bridges dark academia minimalism with festive Indian craftsmanship.

name: Herringbone Tweed Kanjivaram Fusion Saree
description: Featuring a rich amber Kanjivaram silk body anchored by a custom herringbone tweed pallu and blouse. It delivers structured warmth and a vintage collegiate aesthetic for autumnal festive gatherings.

name: Terracotta Velvet Layered Bandhgala Set
description: A structured bandhgala jacket crafted in plush terracotta velvet and accented with brass crest buttons. Designed for late-night cultural programs during Durga Puja, offering both insulation and dark academia flair.

name: Scholar Burgundy Raw Silk Pleated Kurta
description: Tailored with knife pleats along the front placket, this high-neck raw silk kurta evokes modern scholar style. Pair it with tapered trousers and leather oxfords for a crisp Ashtami morning look.

name: Vintage Plaid Pashmina Shawl Wrap
description: An ultra-soft pashmina shawl woven in a classic dark tartan plaid motif with metallic zari fringes. Essential for layering over any saree or kurta set during brisk Puja evenings.

name: Oxford Tan Woolen Cape Tussar Silk Saree
description: This striking ensemble includes a raw Tussar silk saree draped under a structured Oxford tan woolen cape coat. The silhouette merges vintage British academic tailoring with authentic Bengali weave craftsmanship.

name: Mahogany Velvet Corset Kurti Set
description: A dark mahogany velvet kurti featuring a boned corset bodice and soft pleated georgette sleeves. Perfect for Gen-Z fashion enthusiasts who love dark moody academia aesthetics for festive nightouts.

name: Cream Cable-Knit Turtleneck Tissue Saree
description: Pair a shimmering gold tissue silk saree with an ivory chunky cable-knit turtleneck blouse. This unexpected contrast brings ultimate cozy chic to morning Pushpanjali prayers.

name: Charcoal Houndstooth Raw Silk Long Coat
description: A floor-length raw silk long coat patterned with micro-houndstooth checks and detailed with muted brass buttons. Designed to layer seamlessly over festive kurtas during cool Bengali autumn nights.

name: Brass Brocade Academic Messenger Satchel
description: Handcrafted from deep brown structured leather and vintage brocade fabric panels with antique brass hardware. It holds your festive essentials and books with refined intellectual charm.

name: Deep Plum Ribbed Velvet Straight Kurta Set
description: Features a cozy ribbed velvet straight-cut kurta paired with tailored trousers in a rich plum tone. Soft gold pita embroidery along the high collar adds subtle festive shimmer to a dark academia aesthetic.

name: Saffron Swadeshi Handloom Khadi Saree
description: Channel mid-century elegance with this hand-spun saffron khadi saree featuring intricate vintage temple borders. Perfect for grand Independence Day celebrations, it embodies timeless grace and patriotic heritage.

name: 1970s Ivory Polka Dot Chiffon Saree
description: Inspired by retro Bollywood glamour, this feather-light ivory chiffon saree is adorned with subtle saffron and emerald polka dots. Pair it with a classic sleeveless blouse for an unforgettable vintage festive look.

name: Heritage Emerald Silk Brocade Nehru Jacket
description: Exude understated regal charm in this tailored dark emerald silk brocade Nehru jacket with brass antique buttons. Designed to elevate any plain khadi kurta ensemble for patriotic formal gatherings.

name: Freedom Era Pin-Tucked Cotton Kurta
description: Crafted from breathable handwoven white cotton, this retro-fit kurta features delicate pin-tucks and coconut shell buttons. It captures the understated purity and dignity of mid-20th-century Indian fashion.

name: Retro Tricolor Chevron Pleated Midi Skirt
description: A delightful 1950s swing skirt updated with subtle saffron, off-white, and deep forest green vertical pleats. This playful retro staple brings a chic touch of patriotic pride to your daytime celebrations.

name: Charkha Motif Raw Silk Saree
description: Woven in deep navy blue raw silk, this statement saree highlights vintage gold zari charkha motifs across the drape. It stands as a sophisticated tribute to freedom, craft, and classic style.

name: Vintage Ashoka Print Printed Silk Scarf
description: This luxurious silk square scarf features a vintage distressed Ashoka Chakra motif against an ivory backdrop. Drape it around your neck or handbag for a subtle retro accent on Independence Day.

name: Saffron Block-Printed Mulmul Anarkali
description: Flowy and nostalgic, this saffron mulmul Anarkali suit set brings 1960s flare to life with intricate wooden block prints. Lightweight and breezy, it promises comfort for all-day outdoor events.

name: Nostalgic Off-White Linen Cuban Collar Shirt
description: Featuring a relaxed 1970s silhouette, this off-white linen shirt boasts subtle navy and green hand-embroidery along the placket. Ideal for effortless summer street style with a patriotic twist.

name: Classic Forest Green Velvet Potli Bag
description: Adorned with intricate antique zardozi embroidery, this vintage-inspired velvet potli bag adds regal charm to your ethnic wardrobe. The perfect functional accessory for festive patriotic evening soirees.

name: Retro Tricolor Handloom Khadi Jacket
description: Make a bold urban statement with this structured khadi outerwear featuring geometric retro color blocks in saffron, cream, and olive. Layer it over a plain tee for an instant heritage streetwear look.

name: Royal Navy Blue Velvet Bandhgala Suit
description: Tailored to perfection, this retro-inspired midnight blue velvet bandhgala suit features handcrafted brass lion buttons. A quintessential formal ensemble for grand Independence Day galas.

name: Golden Horizon Chanderi Tissue Dupatta
description: Woven with shimmering metallic threads, this ivory and gold Chanderi tissue dupatta is trimmed with subtle saffron lace. A versatile vintage embellishment to elevate any traditional outfit.

name: Independence Vintage Denim Trucker Jacket
description: This washed vintage denim jacket features hand-embroidered floral motifs inspired by Indian freedom movement textiles. A rugged streetwear piece that blends mid-century nostalgia with contemporary cool.

name: 1960s Emerald Green Georgette Sharara Set
description: Turn heads in this retro emerald green georgette sharara set highlighted with silver gota patti craftsmanship. The flared dramatic silhouette captures the vibrant celebratory mood of the era.

name: Patriotic Stripe Tweed Winter Waistcoat
description: Crafted from handwoven wool tweed, this retro tailored waistcoat features subtle navy, off-white, and orange thread accents. Ideal for layering during crisp evening patriotic events.

name: Saffron Silk Organza Statement Blouse
description: Featuring dramatic 1970s puff sleeves and a high neck bow, this saffron organza blouse radiates vintage flair. Pair it with a contrasting white lace saree for a chic patriotic look.

name: Heritage Khadi Silk Kurta with Zari Trim
description: Draped in rich off-white khadi silk, this classic straight-fit kurta boasts vintage dull-gold zari borders along the cuffs and neck. It is the epitome of quiet luxury and traditional pride.

name: Retro Tricolor Ribbon Leather Loafers
description: Handcrafted in rich brown calfskin leather, these retro penny loafers feature a subtle tricolor webbing tape across the vamp. Perfect for adding a discrete touch of patriotism to formal attire.

name: Swadeshi Cotton Lawn Retro Shirt Dress
description: Designed with a 1950s shirt-waist silhouette, this crisp white cotton lawn dress features subtle saffron piping and wooden buttons. A charming, easy-breezy outfit for Independence Day brunches.

name: Vintage Floral Print Saree Set
description: A classic muted floral saree paired with a dark puff-sleeved blouse. Designed with a retro aesthetic ideal for traditional celebrations.

name: Retro Polka Dot Georgette Saree
description: This vibrant red polka dot saree offers a playful vintage aesthetic with a classic draped silhouette. Paired with a minimal white blouse, it presents a balanced blend of retro charm and festive grace.

name: Retro Polka Dot Cotton Saree
description: This off-white saree features classic red polka dots with a traditional printed border. Ideal for Chhath Puja, it delivers a graceful retro vintage aesthetic.

name: Retro Polka Dot Chiffon Saree
description: Features a bold red and black polka dot pattern draped in a contemporary aesthetic. This lightweight ethnic ensemble offers a vintage fusion look suitable for festive occasions.

name: Retro Sunset Orange Saree Set
description: An elegant orange chiffon saree paired with a contrasting black puff-sleeve blouse. Perfect for traditional festivities with a sophisticated retro charm.

name: Retro Gold-Bordered Festive Red Dupatta Set
description: Traditional red ethnic wear featuring heavy golden embellished borders for a classic festive appearance. Perfect for vintage-inspired festive celebrations and cultural ceremonies.

name: Retro Polka Dot Front-Tie Shirt Outfit
description: Features a vintage white polka-dot printed shirt with a front-knot accent and matching headband. Delivers a relaxed, classic 90s aesthetic for casual wear.

name: Retro Floral Printed Ethnic Lehenga Set
description: Vintage ethnic ensemble featuring a fitted black top paired with a flared floral skirt. Delivers a timeless traditional style suitable for festive celebrations.

name: Retro Striped Vintage Collar Shirt
description: A vibrant 70s-inspired button-down shirt featuring bold orange, purple, and green vertical stripes. Designed with a structured collar and retro styling ideal for themed casual wear.

name: Retro Magenta Ethnic Skirt Set
description: Features a white crop corset paired with a printed magenta flared skirt. Offers a fusion of traditional pattern work and vintage styling for festive events.

name: Classic Dark Academia Layered Skirt Set
description: This sophisticated ensemble features a sleek black turtleneck layered beneath a charcoal ribbed sweater vest, paired perfectly with an elegant brown pleated midi skirt. Accentuated with a refined waist belt, it effortlessly captures a cozy vintage winter aesthetic ideal for cool-weather occasions.

name: Chestnut Brown Winter Academia Layered Ensemble
description: This elegant winter academia ensemble features rich earthy tones with sophisticated layering of cozy knits, tailored trench coats, and fluid pleated skirts. Designed with a classic vintage-inspired silhouette, it offers a refined yet comfortable aesthetic perfect for crisp festive evenings.

name: Dark Academia Plaid Maxi Skirt & Overcoat Set
description: This sophisticated winter ensemble features a high-waisted plaid A-line maxi skirt paired with a cozy ribbed brown turtleneck and a long tailored trench coat. Perfect for cool winter days, it delivers an effortless vintage dark academia vibe with elegant layering and rich earth tones.

name: Academia Shearling Aviator & Wide-Leg Denim Set
description: This cozy winter academia ensemble features a dark brown faux-leather shearling aviator jacket layered over a textured cream ribbed turtleneck knit sweater and paired with vintage dark-wash wide-leg denim. Complete with warm knit accessories and plush suede platform booties, it offers a sophisticated yet comfortable cold-weather aesthetic.

name: Academia Plaid Trench and Turtleneck Outfit Ensemble
description: This sophisticated winter ensemble features a classic long brown trench coat layered over a cozy turtleneck knit and an elegant plaid skirt. Perfect for achieving a refined winter academia look, it seamlessly blends timeless tailoring with warm, layered comfort.

name: Espresso Plaid Pleated Midi & Trench Winter Set
description: Embrace a sophisticated dark academia aesthetic with this tailored long coat layered over a cozy ribbed turtleneck and a high-waisted plaid pleated midi skirt. Perfect for chilly festive evenings and vintage-inspired winter wardrobes, offering timeless structure and cozy warmth.

name: Espresso Winter Academia Layered Trouser Set
description: This sophisticated dark academia ensemble features a cropped brown jacket layered over an off-white turtleneck ribbed knit, paired perfectly with fluid high-waisted wide-leg trousers. Complete with vintage-inspired brown accessories and a patterned silk scarf, it delivers a cozy yet effortlessly chic preppy aesthetic.

name: Retro Stars and Stripes Patriotic Jumpsuit
description: This vintage-inspired outfit features a starry blue collared top paired with high-waisted red and white striped trousers. It offers a chic, nostalgic look ideal for Independence Day festivities.
